title: Step 4: Click  and follow your browser prompts to download the file.

sections.heading: Required Access
sections.body:
To download your Online Archive query logs, you must have
[Project Data Access Read Only](<Project Data Access Read Only>) access or higher to the project.

sections.heading: Procedure
sections.body:
To download query logs:You can chose one of these:* Online Archive Only to download logs for queries
  against your Online Archive only

* Cluster and Online Archive to download logs for queries
  against both the Atlas cluster and Online ArchiveYou can chose one of these:* Last 4 Hours

* Last 8 Hours

* Last 12 Hours

* Last 24 Hours

* Custom DateThe downloaded log filename varies based on the Source
for which you are downloading the logs:<Tab tabid="oaonly">
  Online Archive Only

  ```shell
  <cluster-name>_archive_only_<start-date>_<end-date>_queries.log.gz
  ```
</Tab>Cluster and Online Archive```shell
<cluster-name>_cluster_archive_<start-date>_<end-date>_queries.log.gz
```
